creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #9)

Thanks for the offer. I will try tomorrow to provide generate a Code Review in phabricator.

I am unsure what is the correct ports procedure though:

- Should the original port be moved or copied under each of the new ports?
- Can I just remove the old port or should it be labelled "deprecated"?

Thanks again.
